name: Potato and Scallion Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Fry the sliced potatoes in vegetable oil until golden brown.
3. Arrange the fried potatoes in a casserole dish.
4. Sprinkle scallions over the potatoes.
5. Add butter, eggs, salt, and paprika on top of the scallions.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 30-35 minutes or until set.
